verificationNotes: Real model, confirmed via anthropic.com/news/claude-4 (release 2025-05-22, $3/$15 pricing, 200K context). All 7 result rows confirmed verbatim via direct fetch of datacamp.com/blog/claude-4. Note Sonnet 4's 72.7% SWE-bench actually edges out Opus 4's 72.5%, consistent with the 'matching...at a fraction of the price' framing. Per Anthropic's official model-deprecations page (fetched 2026-07-12), claude-sonnet-4-20250514 was deprecated 2026-04-14 and RETIRED 2026-06-15 — already past as of today (2026-07-12), so apiAvailable corrected to false (status kept as 'deprecated', closest available enum value; true current state is 'retired').
